titleStmt.title: SII 38.100: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of twelve buffaloes by Kaḻiyaṉ Taṇḍai Tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ alias Vikkiramaśōḻap Paḍuvūr-nāḍāḻvāṉ, who was the watch and ward of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. Kaṇṇāḷaṉ Oṟṟikoṇḍāṉ Māḷavīrakkōṉ, a temple shepherd, who is a resident of Tiribhuvanasundara-tēruvu agreed to measure out 45 nāḻi of oil for burning half-alamp and Kulavan Ayyanaḍi another 45 nāḻi of oil possibly for another half-a-lamp. Besides, a lady Āṭkoṇḍi, the wife of the above donor, donated twelve buffaloes for burning another perpetual lamp. Two residents of Tiribhuvanasundara-tēruvu, Saṅkaṉ Śirakkaṉ and Tirumeṟṟaḷi Śāṇaṉ agreed to measure out 45 nāḻi of oil each for the said lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī
rājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu pa(ā)ttāvatu jaya
ṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu U
ṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tiruvellaikāvaluṭaiya
kaḻiyaṉ taṇṭai tirunaṭṭapperumāḷāṉa vikkiramacoḻappaṭuvūr
nāṭāḻvāṉ vaitta tiruṉantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa Erumai
paṉṉiraṇṭu Ittevar tirunantāviḷakkukuṭi tiripuvaṉacuntara
tteru maṉṟāṭikaḷil kaṇṇāḷaṉ Oṟṟikoṇṭāṉ māḷavirak
koṉ viḷakku Araikku Aḷakka kaṭava ney nāṟpattaiñcu
nāḻiyum kulavaṉ Aiyyanaṭi Aḷakka kaṭava ney nāṟpattaiñcu
nāḻi Ivan Akamuṭaiyāḷ ciṟutavūrp parikkirakattu poṉṉi
Āṭkoṇṭi vaitta tirunantā viḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa Erumai pa
ṉṉiraṇṭum Itteruvil kuṭimakkaḷil caṅkaṉ cirakkaṉ viḷakku Arai
ku ney nāṟpattaiñ ñāḻiyum tirumeṟṟaḷi cāṇaṉ Aḷakku ne
y nāṟpattaiññāḻiyum Ippaṭiyāl vanta ney candrāditta
varai celuttakkaṭavomānom �-itu pa
nmāheśvararakṣai � .—
Digital edition of SII 38.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
